action_units.descriptions:
- AU1 (Inner Brow Raise): inner eyebrows raised (strength: 1.4306)
- AU2 (Outer Brow Raise): outer eyebrows raised (strength: 0.6092)
- AU5 (Upper Lid Raise): eyes wide open (strength: 0.4504)
- AU12 (Lip Corner Puller): lip corners pulled up (smile) (strength: 1.4898)
- AU14 (Dimpler): asymmetric lip movement (one-sided) (strength: 0.0694)
- AU24 (Lip Pressor): lips pressed together (strength: 0.0140)
- AU26 (Jaw Drop): mouth open (jaw dropped) (strength: 0.8931)

attention.summary:
- Strong attention on nose area (intensity: 0.90)
- Strong attention on left eye region (intensity: 0.84)
- Strong attention on right eye region (intensity: 0.72)

explanation:

- **AU1 (Inner Brow Raise)**: Raised inner eyebrows.
- **AU2 (Outer Brow Raise)**: Raised outer eyebrows.
- **AU5 (Upper Lid Raise)**: Eyes wide open.
